description_long: This is a compact, retro-styled toaster with a smooth, rounded rectangular body finished in a pastel blue color. The top features two wide, metallic toast slots with a brushed steel finish, suitable for standard bread slices. The front panel is equipped with a lever, a circular timer or browning control dial, and several small indicator buttons, all in metallic and black accents. The base is black and slightly flared, providing stability and a visual contrast to the colored body. The sides are mostly plain, with one side showing a protruding lever and the other side smooth and uninterrupted. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a hint of vintage charm, making it suitable for contemporary urban kitchens or café settings.
description: A pastel blue, retro-style toaster with two metallic toast slots, a black base, and a front panel featuring a lever, dial, and buttons.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth pastel blue body, black base, and a protruding lever on the right.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the control panel with a lever, circular dial, and several buttons, as well as the metallic toast slots on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0 but without the lever, showing a clean, uninterrupted blue surface.
description_view_3: Rear view with a rounded, plain blue surface and black base, no visible controls or features.
attribute_control_knobs: One circular metallic dial on the front left, with a black center and possible markings, plus a lever and several small round buttons.
attribute_toast_slots: Two wide, rectangular metallic toast slots on the top, evenly spaced and parallel.
